ItacPersonItem.Notes: Haberdasher. Benvoglienti ascribes to him an emblem, representing a false cage with a bird inside, and the motto `Lasso! che poco accorto fui da prima`. Then, he registers one Lattanzio Pannolini as Malaccorto, maybe they are the same person.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
